posts.title: Stream常用操作
posts.text: List根据某个属性去重12345ArrayList<SKU> skus = skuList.stream().collect( Collectors.collectingAndThen( Collectors.toCollection( () -> new TreeSet<>(Comparator.comparing(n -> n.getGid()))) , ArrayList::new)); 指定字段排序(升序)123orderList.stream() .sorted(Comparator.comparing(Order::getCreateTime)) .collect(Collectors.toList()); 指定字段排序(降序)123orderList.stream() .sorted(Comparator.comparing(Order::getCreateTime).reversed()) .collect(Collectors.toList()); 指定字段排序(null排前面)123List<LuckyBoysVo> luckyBoysVoList = luckyBoysList.stream() .sorted(Comparator.comparing(LuckyBoysVo::getUsageTime, Comparator.nullsFirst(Date::compareTo))) .collect(Collectors.toList()); 指定字段相同，指定值计算和123456789101112exportAgentVoList.stream() .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(o->(o.getGoodsId() +o.getAgentId()),Collectors.toList())) .forEach((id, transfer) -> { transfer.stream() .reduce((a,b)-> new ExportAgentVo(a.getDealCode(), a.getAgentId(), a.getGoodsId(), a.getGoodName(), a.getCount() + b.getCount(), a.getName(), a.getAddress())) .ifPresent(exportAgentVoListResult::add); }); 指定字段相同，计算相同个数123// 根据指定字段，计算个数 Map<String, Long> map = list.stream() .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(TkDetailMaskLayerMapping::getMaskId, Collectors.counting())); 指定字段分组12Map<String, List<ExportAgentVo>> exportAgentVoMap = exportAgentVoListResult.stream() .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(ExportAgentVo::getAgentId)); 分组 并求和123456789/*分组 并求和Collectors.gropingBy(分组的字段,Collectors.summingInt(求和的字段))*/ Map<String, Integer> goodCountMap = goodsProcurementDetailVos.stream() .filter(a -> a.getSupplierName().equals(exportGoodsProcurementDetailVo.getSupplierName()) && a.getAgentId().equals(exportGoBeerVo.getAgentId())) .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(ExportGoodsProcurementDetailVo::getGoodsId, Collectors.summingInt(ExportGoodsProcurementDetailVo::getCount))); List转Map1234567891011121314List<CustomerDetailResp> result = new ArrayList<>();Map<String, String> map = result.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(CustomerDetailResp::getDept, CustomerDetailResp::getMembers));// 另一种方式Map<String, CustomerDetailResp> map = result.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(CustomerDetailResp::getDept, CustomerDetailResp -> CustomerDetailResp));/** * List -> Map * 需要注意的是： * toMap 如果集合对象有重复的key，会报错Duplicate key .... * apple1,apple12的id都为1。 * 可以用 (k1,k2)->k1 来设置，如果有重复的key,则保留key1,舍弃key2 */Map<Integer, Apple> appleMap = appleList.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(Apple::getId, a -> a,(k1,k2)->k1)); List转String1String join = Joiner.on(',').join(itemNoList); String转List1List<String> saleList = Arrays.stream(sales.split(",")).distinct().collect(Collectors.toList());

posts.title: 解决大文件无法上传
posts.path: wiki/程序员人生/Git/解决大文件无法上传/
posts.text: 重写commit，删除大文件1git filter-branch --force --index-filter 'git rm -rf --cached --ignore-unmatch yes-service-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar' --prune-empty --tag-name-filter cat -- --all 推送修改后的仓库1git push github master 清理和回收空间123rm -rf .git/refs/original/git reflog expire --expire=now --allgit gc --prune=now

posts.title: 备份数据库
posts.path: wiki/程序员人生/MySQL/备份数据库/
posts.text: 备份脚本如下: 1mysqldump --opt -Q 数据库名 -h服务器IP -u用户名 -p密码>文件名.sql

posts.title: XML高级映射
posts.text: 映射一对多，多中嵌套一对一123456789101112131415161718192021222324<resultMap id="tkDetailCdCompleteMap" type="com.gc.tkdms.form.vo.TkDetailCdCompleteVO"> <result column="APPLY_ID" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="id"/> <result column="CREATE_TIME" jdbcType="TIMESTAMP" property="createTime"/> <result column="APPLY_TITLE" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="applyTitle"/> <collection property="tkDetailCdBasic" ofType="com.gc.tkdms.form.vo.TkDetailCdBasicVO"> <id column="basicId" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="id" /> <result column="bCreateBy" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="createBy" /> <result column="bCreateTime" jdbcType="TIMESTAMP" property="createTime" /> <result column="bUpdateBy" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="updateBy" /> <result column="bUpdateTime" jdbcType="TIMESTAMP" property="updateTime" /> <result column="DOUBLE_CHECK" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="doubleCheckId" /> <association property="doubleCheck" javaType="com.gc.tkdms.form.vo.ComponentEmpVO" resultMap="doubleCheckEmpMap"> </association> </collection> <collection property="tkDetailCdMaskMappings" ofType="com.gc.tkdms.form.entity.TkDetailCdMaskMapping"> <id column="mappingId" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="id" /> <result column="mCreateBy" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="createBy" /> <result column="mCreateTime" jdbcType="TIMESTAMP" property="createTime" /> <result column="mUpdateBy" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="updateBy" /> <result column="mUpdateTime" jdbcType="TIMESTAMP" property="updateTime" /> </collection></resultMap> 123456<resultMap id="doubleCheckEmpMap" type="com.gc.tkdms.form.vo.ComponentEmpVO"> <id column="emp_id" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="id" /> <result column="emp_id" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="username" /> <result column="REALNAME" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="realname" /> <result column="DISPLAYNAME" jdbcType="VARCHAR" property="displayName" /></resultMap>

posts.title: 存储过程
posts.text: 隐式游标12345678910111213CREATE OR REPLACEPROCEDURE "SP_TEST_MASK" AS-- 定义隐式游标，保存一条记录customer CUSTOMER_INFO%ROWTYPE;BEGIN SELECT * INTO customer FROM SYNCDA1.CUSTOMER_INFO WHERE CUSTOMERCODE = 'XKS'; IF (SQL%FOUND) THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line('客户名称：' ||customer.customername); END IF; EXCEPTION WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line('客户不存在');END;

posts.title: 常见脚本
posts.text: 批量插入操作123456789101112131415161718192021INSERT ALL <foreach collection="list" item="item" index="index"> INTO TTP_TOPTIER_QUESTION <trim prefix="(" suffix=")"> <include refid="Base_List"></include> </trim> <trim prefix="VALUES (" suffix=")"> #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.basicInfoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.question,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.answer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.answerEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.questionEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.optionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} </trim> </foreach> SELECT 1 FROM DUAL 批量更新操作123456789<update id="updateBatch" parameterType="java.util.List"> <foreach collection="list" item="item" index="index" open="begin" close=";end;" separator=";"> update table_A <set> name= #{item.name} </set> where id= item.id </foreach></update> 查询相关操作内连接去重12345SELECT DISTINCT ar.id, ar.parent_id, ar.res_key, ar.res_name, ar.res_type, ar.component, ar.path, ar.perms, ar.icon, ar.sort_no, ar.visible, ar.target, ar.redirect, ar.defaultedFROM ADM_RESOURCE ar INNER JOIN ADM_ROLE_RESOURCE arr ON ar.ID = arr.RESOURCE_ID INNER JOIN ADM_ROLE R on arr.ROLE_ID = R.ID INNER JOIN ADM_ROLE_USER aru on aru.ROLE_ID = R.ID; 递归查询12345678910-- 向下递归SELECT ID, USER_NAME FROM ORG_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT START WITH ID='1374231638187180032' CONNECT BY PRIOR ID = CREATED_BY -- 向上递归UNION SELECT ID,USER_NAME FROM ORG_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT START WITH ID='1374231638187180032' CONNECT BY PRIOR CREATED_BY = ID 判断日期区间123456SELECT ID, TITLE, TYPE, TIME_TYPE, SEND_DATE, END_DATE, RECEIVE_PERSONFROM POR_ANNOUNCEMENTWHERE (SEND_DATE IS NULL OR SYSDATE > SEND_DATE)AND (END_DATE IS NULL OR END_DATE > SYSDATE)ORDER BY CREATE_TM DESC 第一个查询无结果采用第二个查询结果1234SELECT ID,USER_NAME,NVL((SELECT NAME FROM ORG_EMPLOYEE WHERE ID = CREATED_BY), (SELECT USER_NAME FROM ORG_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT WHERE ID = CREATED_BY)) AS name FROM ORG_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT WHERE ID = '1369819577617219584'; 分组并把相同GROUP BY变成一条数据123SELECT BASIC_INFO_ID, (LISTAGG(DEVICE_NAME,',') within group ( order by BASIC_INFO_ID)) AS DEVICENAMES FROM MCI_SERVICE_REQUEST GROUP BY BASIC_INFO_ID 分组并把相同GROUP BY 变成一条数据.png 查询条件去重，去重条件是一个字段，显示是多个字段12SELECT * FROM (SELECT ID_, PROC_INST_ID_, TASK_DEF_KEY_, row_number() over (partition by PROC_INST_ID_ order by ID_ DESC) AS ABC FROM ACT_HI_TASKINST) A WHERE A.ABC = 1; partition by 分组条件order by 排序条件 去重.png 创建视图1234567CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW V_USER_INFO ASSELECT ID, (NAME || '(' || JOB_NUMBER || ')') AS DISPLAY_NUMBER_NAME, NAMEFROM ORG_EMPLOYEEUNIONSELECT ID, USER_NAME, USER_NAMEFROM ORG_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNTWITH READ ONLY 查看视图的创建语句1select text from all_views where view_name ='V_CUSTOMER_INFO' 获得最新数据(根据指定字段排序并分组)1234SELECT FI.* FROM ( SELECT T.*, ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY T.DEVICE_NAME ORDER BY T.CREATE_TM DESC ) RW FROM DEV_BASIC_INFO T ) FI WHERE FI.RW =1 CREATE_TM 是排序的字段DEVICE_NAME 是去重复的条件 Oracle数据库分页查询出现重复如果排序的字段没有唯一性，需要后面加上一个主键，如下 12345-- 原来的排序ORDER BY CREATE_TM;-- 优化后的排序ORDER BY CREATE_TM, ID ORACLE行数据逗号分割转列1234SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_SUBSTR(MEMBERS, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL, 'i')FROM ADM_CIDB_DETAILWHERE CUST_CODE = 'SRJ'CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(MEMBERS) - LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(MEMBERS, ',', '')) + 1; ORACLE中IN长度大于1000时处理123456789101112131415<if test="ids != null"> t1.ID IN <!-- 处理in的集合超过1000条时Oracle不支持的情况 --> <trim suffixOverrides=" OR t1.ID IN()"> <!-- 表示删除最后一个条件 --> <foreach collection="ids" item="id" index="index" open="(" close=")"> <if test="index != 0"> <choose> <when test="index % 1000 == 999">) OR t1.ID IN (</when> <otherwise>,</otherwise> </choose> </if> #{id} </foreach> </trim> </if> 分组多个字段，合并某一个字段，并行转列1、分组多个字段合并某一个字段 1234-- 分组多个字段，合并某一个字段SELECT AREA,CUST_CODE, DEPT, (LISTAGG(MEMBERS,',') within group ( order by AREA, DEPT, CUST_CODE)) AS DEVICENAMES FROM ADM_CIDB_DETAIL GROUP BY AREA, DEPT, CUST_CODE 2、内容行转列 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425SELECT t.CUST_CODE, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'hcBackupce' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS hcBackupce, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'hcBackupcs' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS hcBackupcs, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'hcBackupsales' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS hcBackupsales, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'hcCe' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS hcCe, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'hcCs' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS hcCs, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'hcSales' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS hcSales, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'lgBackupce' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS lgBackupce, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'lgBackupcs' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS lgBackupcs, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'lgBackupsales' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS lgBackupsales, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'lgCe' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS lgCe, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'lgCs' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS lgCs, MAX(CASE t.DEPT WHEN 'lgSales' THEN t.MEMBER ELSE '' END) AS lgSalesFROM ( SELECT CUST_CODE, lower(AREA) || initcap(DEPT) AS DEPT, ( LISTAGG(MEMBERS, ',') within GROUP ( ORDER BY AREA, DEPT, CUST_CODE )) AS MEMBER FROM ADM_CIDB_DETAIL GROUP BY AREA, DEPT, CUST_CODE ) tGROUP BY t.CUST_CODE 某张表授权给某一个用户1GRANT SELECT ON ORGDA1.ORG_DEPARTMENT TO ADMINDA1;

posts.title: 注意事项
posts.text: 推荐指定数据表的库名,如下： 1SELECT * FROM ADMINDA1.ADM_USER; 指定数据表的别名，不能使用AS，如下 1SELECT * FROM ADMINDA1.ADM_USER USER; 判断字段是否是空字符串，如果是，则用NULL代替 1DECODE(字段,'',NULL)

posts.title: Harbor
posts.text: 如何在Harbor上创建镜像 打Docker Tag 12docker tag SOURCE_IMAGE[:TAG] IP:PORT/IMAGE[:TAG]# IP:PORT Harbor地址 推送到仓库 1docker push IP:PORT/IMAGE[:TAG]

posts.title: 代码手动分页
posts.path: wiki/程序员人生/Java/常用工具/代码手动分页/
posts.text: 12345678910// 数据总条数 int size = resps.size();// 分割数据(手动分页) List<QueryDeviceNameResp> queryDeviceNameResps = resps.subList((pageNo - 1) * pageSize > size ? size : (pageNo - 1) * pageSize, pageNo * pageSize > size ? size : pageNo * pageSize);// 记录数据page.setRecords(queryDeviceNameResps);// 总条数page.setTotal(size);// 总页数page.setPages(size / pageSize + 1);

posts.title: Hello Wiki
posts.text: 介绍这是个人的Wiki知识库，总结工作中遇到的知识点。

posts.title: 常见命令
posts.text: 容器如何进入容器中1docker exec -it 容器ID /bin/bash 如何复制容器中的文件到本地1docker cp 容器id:/容器中的文件 本地路径
